description: Claude Code agent metrics dashboard — cost, tokens, turns, and session analytics

panels.title: Total Cost (Today)
panels.description: Total spend across all Claude Code sessions that started today. If this is climbing unexpectedly fast, check the Cost by Agent Type panel — a single Opus delegation or a runaway sidechain is usually the culprit.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) as cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE date(recorded_at, 'localtime') = date('now', 'localtime')
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) as cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE date(recorded_at, 'localtime') = date('now', 'localtime')

panels.title: Total Cost (All Time)
panels.description: Cumulative spend since metrics collection began. Use this as a baseline when estimating project budgets — compare against the Cost by Project panel to see which codebases consume the most.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) as cost FROM agent_metrics
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) as cost FROM agent_metrics

panels.title: Total Tokens (Today)
panels.description: Combined input and output tokens consumed today across all agents. A high token count relative to low cost suggests good cache utilization — check Cache Efficiency to confirm context is being reused rather than re-billed.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens), 0) as total_tokens FROM agent_metrics WHERE date(recorded_at, 'localtime') = date('now', 'localtime')
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens), 0) as total_tokens FROM agent_metrics WHERE date(recorded_at, 'localtime') = date('now', 'localtime')

panels.title: Total Tokens (All Time)
panels.description: Cumulative token volume since tracking began. Divide by Total Cost (All Time) to get an approximate effective cost-per-token — a rising cost-per-token over time suggests cache hit rates are degrading.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens), 0) as total_tokens FROM agent_metrics
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens), 0) as total_tokens FROM agent_metrics

panels.title: Sessions Today
panels.description: Number of distinct Claude Code sessions started today. More sessions than expected may indicate frequent restarts due to errors or context overflows — check Error Rate by Agent Type if this number seems high.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) as sessions FROM agent_metrics WHERE date(recorded_at, 'localtime') = date('now', 'localtime')
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) as sessions FROM agent_metrics WHERE date(recorded_at, 'localtime') = date('now', 'localtime')

panels.title: Cost Over Time
panels.description: Daily spend trend across all Claude Code sessions. Spikes usually indicate large Opus delegations or sessions with many turns — check the Cost by Agent Type panel to identify the driver.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT date(recorded_at, 'localtime') || 'T00:00:00Z' as time, COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) as cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY date(recorded_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: SELECT date(recorded_at, 'localtime') || 'T00:00:00Z' as time, COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) as cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY date(recorded_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY time

panels.title: Cost by Kanban Session
panels.description: Cumulative spend per kanban session name (e.g., swift-falcon). If one session dwarfs the rest, inspect it in the Top 10 Expensive Sessions table to see which agents drove the cost.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(kanban_session, 'unknown') as session_name, COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) as cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY kanban_session ORDER BY cost DESC LIMIT 10
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(kanban_session, 'unknown') as session_name, COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) as cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY kanban_session ORDER BY cost DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Top 10 Expensive Sessions
panels.description: The costliest individual Claude Code sessions, ranked by total spend. High agent count with moderate turns suggests well-parallelized work; low agent count with high turns suggests a single agent looped or struggled.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT session_id, COALESCE(kanban_session, '') as kanban, working_directory as project, COUNT(*) as agents, SUM(turns) as total_turns, SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens) as total_tokens, ROUND(SUM(cost_usd), 4) as total_cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY session_id ORDER BY total_cost DESC LIMIT 10
targets.queryText: SELECT session_id, COALESCE(kanban_session, '') as kanban, working_directory as project, COUNT(*) as agents, SUM(turns) as total_turns, SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens) as total_tokens, ROUND(SUM(cost_usd), 4) as total_cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY session_id ORDER BY total_cost DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Cost by Agent Type
panels.description: Total accumulated cost per agent role (e.g., swe-backend, scribe, staff-engineer). A role that costs far more than others is your primary cost driver — cross-reference with Turns by Agent Type to determine whether the cost is from many turns or expensive model choices.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT role, COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) as cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE role != 'parent' AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY role ORDER BY cost DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT role, COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) as cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE role != 'parent' AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY role ORDER BY cost DESC

panels.title: Cost by Model
panels.description: Total spend broken down by model family (haiku, sonnet, opus). If sonnet or haiku are unexpectedly high, routine tasks may be over-powered — use Agent x Model Usage to see which roles are driving each model's cost.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT model_family, COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) as cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY model_family ORDER BY cost DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT model_family, COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) as cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY model_family ORDER BY cost DESC

panels.title: Cost by Project
panels.description: Total spend per working directory (git project). A project that suddenly jumps in cost without a corresponding increase in throughput is worth investigating for inefficient delegation patterns.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(REPLACE(working_directory, rtrim(working_directory, replace(working_directory, '/', '')), '~/'), working_directory) as project, COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) as cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY working_directory ORDER BY cost DESC LIMIT 10
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(REPLACE(working_directory, rtrim(working_directory, replace(working_directory, '/', '')), '~/'), working_directory) as project, COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) as cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY working_directory ORDER BY cost DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Token Breakdown
panels.description: Input, output, and cache-read token volumes stacked by model family. A small cache-read segment relative to input means context is being invalidated — check if CLAUDE.md or skill files changed recently.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT model_family, SUM(input_tokens) as input_tok, SUM(output_tokens) as output_tok, SUM(cache_read_tokens) as cache_tok FROM agent_metrics WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY model_family
targets.queryText: SELECT model_family, SUM(input_tokens) as input_tok, SUM(output_tokens) as output_tok, SUM(cache_read_tokens) as cache_tok FROM agent_metrics WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY model_family

panels.title: Cache Efficiency Over Time
panels.description: Percentage of input tokens served from cache vs. fresh input, per day. Below 70% means context is being invalidated frequently — check if CLAUDE.md or skill files changed recently.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT date(recorded_at, 'localtime') || 'T00:00:00Z' as time, COALESCE(AVG(cache_hit_ratio) * 100, 0) as cache_hit_pct FROM agent_metrics WHERE cache_hit_ratio > 0 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY date(recorded_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: SELECT date(recorded_at, 'localtime') || 'T00:00:00Z' as time, COALESCE(AVG(cache_hit_ratio) * 100, 0) as cache_hit_pct FROM agent_metrics WHERE cache_hit_ratio > 0 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY date(recorded_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY time

panels.title: Turns by Agent Type
panels.description: Total API round-trips accumulated per agent role. A role with high turns AND high cost is worth examining in Avg Turns per Session by Agent x Model to see if model selection could be optimized.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT role, SUM(turns) as total_turns FROM agent_metrics WHERE role != 'parent' AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY role ORDER BY total_turns DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT role, SUM(turns) as total_turns FROM agent_metrics WHERE role != 'parent' AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY role ORDER BY total_turns DESC

panels.title: Session Timeline (Cost + Tool Calls)
panels.description: Each dot represents a session plotted by start time, showing cost, tool call count, and duration. Dots high on the cost axis with low tool calls suggest token-heavy reasoning without much action — a signal to tighten the task definition.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT MIN(recorded_at) as time, COALESCE(kanban_session, session_id) as session_label, ROUND(SUM(cost_usd), 4) as session_cost, SUM(tool_calls) as total_tool_calls, ROUND(SUM(duration_seconds) / 60.0, 1) as duration_minutes FROM agent_metrics WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY session_id ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: SELECT MIN(recorded_at) as time, COALESCE(kanban_session, session_id) as session_label, ROUND(SUM(cost_usd), 4) as session_cost, SUM(tool_calls) as total_tool_calls, ROUND(SUM(duration_seconds) / 60.0, 1) as duration_minutes FROM agent_metrics WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY session_id ORDER BY time

panels.title: Tool Usage Heatmap (by Agent)
panels.description: Call frequency and error count per tool, broken down by agent role. Red cells in the Errors column indicate a tool failing repeatedly — this often points to a permission gap or a prompt instructing the agent to use tools it is not allowed to run.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT role, tool_name, SUM(call_count) as calls, SUM(error_count) as errors FROM agent_tool_usage WHERE role != 'parent' AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY role, tool_name ORDER BY calls DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT role, tool_name, SUM(call_count) as calls, SUM(error_count) as errors FROM agent_tool_usage WHERE role != 'parent' AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY role, tool_name ORDER BY calls DESC

panels.title: Top Tools (All Agents Combined)
panels.description: Most-called tools across all agent types, ranked by volume. If WebSearch or WebFetch is unexpectedly high, check whether agents are fetching information that should already be in local documentation or Context7.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT tool_name, SUM(call_count) as total_calls FROM agent_tool_usage WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY tool_name ORDER BY total_calls DESC LIMIT 30
targets.queryText: SELECT tool_name, SUM(call_count) as total_calls FROM agent_tool_usage WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY tool_name ORDER BY total_calls DESC LIMIT 30

panels.title: Most Denied Tools
panels.description: Tools that were blocked by the permission system, ranked by denial count. Repeated denials for the same tool indicate an agent is attempting actions it is not authorized for — either the task prompt needs adjustment to stay within allowed scope, or the permission configuration needs to explicitly allow that tool for that workflow.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT tool_name, COUNT(*) as denials FROM permission_denials WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY tool_name ORDER BY denials DESC LIMIT 20
targets.queryText: SELECT tool_name, COUNT(*) as denials FROM permission_denials WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY tool_name ORDER BY denials DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Error Rate by Agent Type
panels.description: Percentage of tool calls that resulted in errors, per agent role. Above 15% (red threshold) suggests systemic issues — cross-reference with the Tool Usage Heatmap to identify which specific tools are failing.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT role, CASE WHEN SUM(tool_calls) > 0 THEN ROUND(CAST(SUM(tool_errors) AS REAL) / SUM(tool_calls) * 100, 1) ELSE 0 END as error_pct FROM agent_metrics WHERE role != 'parent' AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY role ORDER BY error_pct DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT role, CASE WHEN SUM(tool_calls) > 0 THEN ROUND(CAST(SUM(tool_errors) AS REAL) / SUM(tool_calls) * 100, 1) ELSE 0 END as error_pct FROM agent_metrics WHERE role != 'parent' AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY role ORDER BY error_pct DESC

panels.title: Latency Distribution by Agent Type
panels.description: Average turn-to-response latency in seconds per agent role. If haiku shows similar latency to sonnet, the speed advantage of the cheaper model is being lost — check token counts per turn.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT role, COALESCE(AVG(avg_turn_latency_seconds), 0) as avg_latency FROM agent_metrics WHERE role != 'parent' AND avg_turn_latency_seconds > 0 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY role ORDER BY avg_latency DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT role, COALESCE(AVG(avg_turn_latency_seconds), 0) as avg_latency FROM agent_metrics WHERE role != 'parent' AND avg_turn_latency_seconds > 0 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY role ORDER BY avg_latency DESC

panels.title: Cost per Tool Call by Agent
panels.description: Average dollar cost per tool call, per agent role. If an agent exceeds $0.10 per call (red threshold), consider splitting its tasks into smaller, more focused cards.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT role, CASE WHEN SUM(tool_calls) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(cost_usd) / SUM(tool_calls), 4) ELSE 0 END as cost_per_tool_call FROM agent_metrics WHERE role != 'parent' AND tool_calls > 0 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY role ORDER BY cost_per_tool_call DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT role, CASE WHEN SUM(tool_calls) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(cost_usd) / SUM(tool_calls), 4) ELSE 0 END as cost_per_tool_call FROM agent_metrics WHERE role != 'parent' AND tool_calls > 0 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY role ORDER BY cost_per_tool_call DESC

panels.title: Session Duration by Agent Type
panels.description: Average wall-clock time per session in seconds, broken down by agent role. Long sessions for leaf agents (e.g., scribe, swe-backend) may indicate tasks that are too large — consider splitting cards to reduce per-session scope.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT role, COALESCE(AVG(duration_seconds), 0) as avg_duration FROM agent_metrics WHERE role != 'parent' AND duration_seconds > 0 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY role ORDER BY avg_duration DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT role, COALESCE(AVG(duration_seconds), 0) as avg_duration FROM agent_metrics WHERE role != 'parent' AND duration_seconds > 0 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY role ORDER BY avg_duration DESC

panels.title: Turn Statistics by Agent Type
panels.description: Min, max, average, and p95 turn counts per agent role, with sample size. If p95 is much higher than the average, a small number of sessions are running very long — investigate them in the Top 10 Expensive Sessions table.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT role, MIN(turns) as min_turns, MAX(turns) as max_turns, ROUND(AVG(turns), 1) as avg_turns, MAX(CASE WHEN pct <= 0.95 THEN turns END) as p95_turns, COUNT(*) as sample_count FROM (SELECT role, turns, CAST(ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY role ORDER BY turns) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY role) as pct FROM agent_metrics WHERE role != 'parent' AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000) GROUP BY role ORDER BY avg_turns DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT role, MIN(turns) as min_turns, MAX(turns) as max_turns, ROUND(AVG(turns), 1) as avg_turns, MAX(CASE WHEN pct <= 0.95 THEN turns END) as p95_turns, COUNT(*) as sample_count FROM (SELECT role, turns, CAST(ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY role ORDER BY turns) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY role) as pct FROM agent_metrics WHERE role != 'parent' AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000) GROUP BY role ORDER BY avg_turns DESC

panels.title: Agent x Model Usage
panels.description: Cross-reference of agent types with model families. Shows call frequency and cost patterns to identify expensive or over-engineered model selections.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT role, model_family, COUNT(*) as calls, ROUND(SUM(cost_usd), 4) as total_cost_usd, ROUND(AVG(cost_usd), 4) as avg_cost_per_call FROM agent_metrics WHERE role != 'parent' AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY role, model_family ORDER BY calls DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT role, model_family, COUNT(*) as calls, ROUND(SUM(cost_usd), 4) as total_cost_usd, ROUND(AVG(cost_usd), 4) as avg_cost_per_call FROM agent_metrics WHERE role != 'parent' AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY role, model_family ORDER BY calls DESC

panels.title: Redo Rate by Agent x Model
panels.description: How often cards are sent back for rework, broken down by agent type and model. Use this to tune model selection — if haiku produces far more redos than sonnet for the same agent, that's a signal to upgrade the default.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT persona, model, SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'redo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as redos, SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'done' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completions, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'redo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN event_type IN ('done','redo') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 1) as redo_rate_pct FROM kanban_card_events WHERE persona IS NOT NULL AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY persona, model HAVING (redos + completions) > 0 ORDER BY redo_rate_pct DESC, redos DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT persona, model, SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'redo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as redos, SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'done' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completions, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'redo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN event_type IN ('done','redo') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 1) as redo_rate_pct FROM kanban_card_events WHERE persona IS NOT NULL AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY persona, model HAVING (redos + completions) > 0 ORDER BY redo_rate_pct DESC, redos DESC

panels.title: Avg Turns per Session by Agent x Model
panels.description: Average API round-trips per session broken down by agent type and model family. High turn counts for cheap models (e.g. haiku) can erase the cost savings — compare avg_turns_per_session across models for the same agent type to spot chatty combos where the cheaper model is actually more expensive in practice.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT role, model_family, COUNT(*) as sessions, SUM(turns) as total_turns, ROUND(CAST(SUM(turns) AS REAL) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) as avg_turns_per_session FROM agent_metrics WHERE role != 'parent' AND is_sidechain = 0 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY role, model_family ORDER BY avg_turns_per_session DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT role, model_family, COUNT(*) as sessions, SUM(turns) as total_turns, ROUND(CAST(SUM(turns) AS REAL) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) as avg_turns_per_session FROM agent_metrics WHERE role != 'parent' AND is_sidechain = 0 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY role, model_family ORDER BY avg_turns_per_session DESC

panels.title: Throughput — Cards Done Per Day
panels.description: Daily card completion velocity. A rising trend means more work is flowing through to done; gaps indicate days with no completions.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT date(recorded_at, 'localtime') || 'T00:00:00Z' as time, COUNT(*) as cards_done FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY date(recorded_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: SELECT date(recorded_at, 'localtime') || 'T00:00:00Z' as time, COUNT(*) as cards_done FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY date(recorded_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY time

panels.title: Redo Rate Over Time
panels.description: Percentage of all kanban events that were redos, by day. A declining trend means quality is improving — fewer cards are being sent back for rework.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT date(recorded_at, 'localtime') || 'T00:00:00Z' as time, SUM(CASE WHEN event_type='redo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) as redo_rate_pct FROM kanban_card_events WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY date(recorded_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: SELECT date(recorded_at, 'localtime') || 'T00:00:00Z' as time, SUM(CASE WHEN event_type='redo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) as redo_rate_pct FROM kanban_card_events WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY date(recorded_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY time

panels.title: Cards Done by Persona
panels.description: Total card completions broken down by agent persona. Shows workload distribution — which agents are carrying the most throughput.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(persona, 'unassigned') as persona, COUNT(*) as completions FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY persona ORDER BY completions DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(persona, 'unassigned') as persona, COUNT(*) as completions FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY persona ORDER BY completions DESC

panels.title: First-Pass Completion Rate by Agent x Model
panels.description: Percentage of cards completed without any redos, broken down by agent and model. A low rate signals the agent-model combo needs recalibration — either the model is under-powered or the task scope is too broad.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT e.persona, e.model, COUNT(DISTINCT e.card_number) as total_done, SUM(CASE WHEN redo_counts.redos IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as first_pass, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN redo_counts.redos IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT e.card_number), 0), 1) as first_pass_pct FROM kanban_card_events e LEFT JOIN (SELECT card_number, COUNT(*) as redos FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'redo' GROUP BY card_number) redo_counts ON e.card_number = redo_counts.card_number WHERE e.event_type = 'done' AND CAST(strftime('%s', e.recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', e.recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY e.persona, e.model ORDER BY first_pass_pct DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT e.persona, e.model, COUNT(DISTINCT e.card_number) as total_done, SUM(CASE WHEN redo_counts.redos IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as first_pass, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN redo_counts.redos IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT e.card_number), 0), 1) as first_pass_pct FROM kanban_card_events e LEFT JOIN (SELECT card_number, COUNT(*) as redos FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'redo' GROUP BY card_number) redo_counts ON e.card_number = redo_counts.card_number WHERE e.event_type = 'done' AND CAST(strftime('%s', e.recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', e.recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY e.persona, e.model ORDER BY first_pass_pct DESC

panels.title: Lead Time Distribution
panels.description: Distribution of how many hours cards take from creation to completion. The bulk of the distribution shows the typical card duration; outliers on the right indicate cards that got stuck or were exceptionally complex.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (julianday(card_completed_at) - julianday(card_created_at)) * 24 as lead_time_hours FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND card_created_at IS NOT NULL AND card_completed_at IS NOT NULL AND CAST(strftime('%s', card_completed_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', card_completed_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000
targets.queryText: SELECT (julianday(card_completed_at) - julianday(card_created_at)) * 24 as lead_time_hours FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND card_created_at IS NOT NULL AND card_completed_at IS NOT NULL AND CAST(strftime('%s', card_completed_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', card_completed_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000

panels.title: Average Lead Time Over Time
panels.description: Daily average card completion time in minutes. A declining trend means work is getting faster — a rising trend may signal increasing scope or complexity.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT date(card_completed_at, 'localtime') || 'T00:00:00Z' as time, AVG((julianday(card_completed_at) - julianday(card_created_at)) * 24 * 60) as avg_lead_time_minutes FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND card_created_at IS NOT NULL AND card_completed_at IS NOT NULL AND CAST(strftime('%s', card_completed_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', card_completed_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY date(card_completed_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: SELECT date(card_completed_at, 'localtime') || 'T00:00:00Z' as time, AVG((julianday(card_completed_at) - julianday(card_created_at)) * 24 * 60) as avg_lead_time_minutes FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND card_created_at IS NOT NULL AND card_completed_at IS NOT NULL AND CAST(strftime('%s', card_completed_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', card_completed_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY date(card_completed_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY time

panels.title: Lead Time by Agent Type
panels.description: Average card completion time (in minutes) per agent persona. Longer bars indicate agents working on higher-complexity cards or models that require more elapsed time.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(persona, 'unassigned') as persona, ROUND(AVG((julianday(card_completed_at) - julianday(card_created_at)) * 24 * 60), 1) as avg_lead_time_minutes, COUNT(*) as card_count FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND persona IS NOT NULL AND card_created_at IS NOT NULL AND card_completed_at IS NOT NULL AND CAST(strftime('%s', card_completed_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', card_completed_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY persona ORDER BY avg_lead_time_minutes DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(persona, 'unassigned') as persona, ROUND(AVG((julianday(card_completed_at) - julianday(card_created_at)) * 24 * 60), 1) as avg_lead_time_minutes, COUNT(*) as card_count FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND persona IS NOT NULL AND card_created_at IS NOT NULL AND card_completed_at IS NOT NULL AND CAST(strftime('%s', card_completed_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', card_completed_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY persona ORDER BY avg_lead_time_minutes DESC

panels.title: Lead Time by Card Type
panels.description: Average completion time (in minutes) for each card type (work, review, research). Compares how long different kinds of cards actually take to flow through to done.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(card_type, 'unknown') as card_type, ROUND(AVG((julianday(card_completed_at) - julianday(card_created_at)) * 24 * 60), 1) as avg_lead_time_minutes, COUNT(*) as card_count FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND card_created_at IS NOT NULL AND card_completed_at IS NOT NULL AND CAST(strftime('%s', card_completed_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', card_completed_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY card_type ORDER BY avg_lead_time_minutes DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(card_type, 'unknown') as card_type, ROUND(AVG((julianday(card_completed_at) - julianday(card_created_at)) * 24 * 60), 1) as avg_lead_time_minutes, COUNT(*) as card_count FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND card_created_at IS NOT NULL AND card_completed_at IS NOT NULL AND CAST(strftime('%s', card_completed_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', card_completed_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY card_type ORDER BY avg_lead_time_minutes DESC

panels.title: AC Count vs Lead Time — Estimation Calibration
panels.description: Average completion time (minutes) grouped by number of acceptance criteria. If the slope is flat, scope is consistently underestimated — use this to calibrate complexity estimates against real completion data.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ac_count, ROUND(AVG((julianday(card_completed_at) - julianday(card_created_at)) * 24 * 60), 1) as avg_lead_time_minutes, COUNT(*) as card_count FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND ac_count IS NOT NULL AND ac_count > 0 AND card_created_at IS NOT NULL AND card_completed_at IS NOT NULL AND CAST(strftime('%s', card_completed_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', card_completed_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY ac_count ORDER BY ac_count
targets.queryText: SELECT ac_count, ROUND(AVG((julianday(card_completed_at) - julianday(card_created_at)) * 24 * 60), 1) as avg_lead_time_minutes, COUNT(*) as card_count FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND ac_count IS NOT NULL AND ac_count > 0 AND card_created_at IS NOT NULL AND card_completed_at IS NOT NULL AND CAST(strftime('%s', card_completed_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', card_completed_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY ac_count ORDER BY ac_count

panels.title: Throughput by Project
panels.description: Card completions and active days per git project. Shows which projects consume the most kanban work and how concentrated or spread the effort is.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(git_project, 'unknown') as project, COUNT(*) as completions, COUNT(DISTINCT date(card_completed_at, 'localtime')) as active_days FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND git_project IS NOT NULL AND CAST(strftime('%s', card_completed_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', card_completed_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY git_project ORDER BY completions DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(git_project, 'unknown') as project, COUNT(*) as completions, COUNT(DISTINCT date(card_completed_at, 'localtime')) as active_days FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND git_project IS NOT NULL AND CAST(strftime('%s', card_completed_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', card_completed_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY git_project ORDER BY completions DESC

panels.title: Cumulative Flow Diagram
panels.description: Cards-in-each-column over time, stacked by status. A growing 'doing' or 'review' band signals a bottleneck — only cards with transition events appear, so historical cards are excluded.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH dates AS (SELECT DISTINCT date(recorded_at, 'localtime') as d FROM kanban_card_events WHERE to_column IS NOT NULL AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000), card_state AS (SELECT d.d as snap_date, e.card_number, e.to_column FROM dates d JOIN kanban_card_events e ON date(e.recorded_at, 'localtime') <= d.d AND e.to_column IS NOT NULL WHERE e.id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM kanban_card_events WHERE card_number = e.card_number AND to_column IS NOT NULL AND date(recorded_at, 'localtime') <= d.d)) SELECT snap_date || 'T00:00:00Z' as time, SUM(CASE WHEN to_column = 'todo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as todo, SUM(CASE WHEN to_column = 'doing' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as doing, SUM(CASE WHEN to_column = 'review' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as review, SUM(CASE WHEN to_column = 'done' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as done FROM card_state GROUP BY snap_date ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: WITH dates AS (SELECT DISTINCT date(recorded_at, 'localtime') as d FROM kanban_card_events WHERE to_column IS NOT NULL AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) >= $__from/1000 AND CAST(strftime('%s', recorded_at) AS INTEGER) <= $__to/1000), card_state AS (SELECT d.d as snap_date, e.card_number, e.to_column FROM dates d JOIN kanban_card_events e ON date(e.recorded_at, 'localtime') <= d.d AND e.to_column IS NOT NULL WHERE e.id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM kanban_card_events WHERE card_number = e.card_number AND to_column IS NOT NULL AND date(recorded_at, 'localtime') <= d.d)) SELECT snap_date || 'T00:00:00Z' as time, SUM(CASE WHEN to_column = 'todo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as todo, SUM(CASE WHEN to_column = 'doing' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as doing, SUM(CASE WHEN to_column = 'review' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as review, SUM(CASE WHEN to_column = 'done' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as done FROM card_state GROUP BY snap_date ORDER BY time

title: Claudit — Claude Code Agent Metrics
